response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a broad technical background, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital markets domains. His profile is more suited to generalist or web-focused roles, though his problem-solving abilities and technical versatility are notable.
strengths: Extensive experience with modern software development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
Strong communication skills and a track record of knowledge-sharing through workshops and talks.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks, indicating adaptability.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last noted in 2015) and no explicit mention of Windows platform development.
No demonstrated experience in fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domains.
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which is not a focus for this role.
